channel.title: Selfhosted on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Selfhosted on Arrans github.io

item.title: logdyhq/logdy-core
item.description: Realtime log viewer with web UI, tail -f for logs with a web interface browser.

item.title: awesome-selfhosted/awesome-selfhosted
item.description: A list of Free Software network services and web applications which can be hosted on your own servers

item.title: traderepublic/Cilicon
item.description: 🛠️ Self-Hosted ephemeral macOS CI on Apple Silicon

item.title: MatiasDesuu/ThinkDashboard
item.description: A lightweight, self-hosted bookmark dashboard with keyboard shortcuts.

item.title: donetick/donetick
item.description: Donetick an open-source, user-friendly app for managing tasks and chores, featuring customizable options to help you and others stay organized

item.title: rustmailer/bichon
item.description: Bichon – A lightweight, high-performance Rust email archiver with WebUI

item.title: TwiN/gatus
item.description: ⛑ Automated developer-oriented status page

item.title: mikeroyal/Self-Hosting-Guide
item.description: Self-Hosting Guide. Learn all about locally hosting (on premises & private web servers) and managing software applications by yourself or your organization. Including Cloud, LLMs, WireGuard, Automation, Home Assistant, and Networking.

item.title: bitmagnet-io/bitmagnet
item.description: A self-hosted BitTorrent indexer, DHT crawler, content classifier and torrent search engine with web UI, GraphQL API and Servarr stack integration.

item.title: louislam/uptime-kuma
item.description: A fancy self-hosted monitoring tool

item.title: seanmorley15/AdventureLog
item.description: Self-hostable travel tracker and trip planner.

item.title: kittendevv/Invio
item.description: Self-hosted invoicing without the bloat.

item.title: BookStackApp/BookStack
item.description: A platform to create documentation/wiki content built with PHP & Laravel

item.title: dockpeek/dockpeek
item.description: Easily access your Docker container web interfaces and keep them up to date — across all your hosts.

item.title: louislam/dockge
item.description: A fancy, easy-to-use and reactive self-hosted docker compose.yaml stack-oriented manager

item.title: gotify/server
item.description: A simple server for sending and receiving messages in real-time per WebSocket. (Includes a sleek web-ui)

item.title: fccview/jotty
item.description: A simple, self-hosted app for your checklists and notes.

item.title: CodeWithCJ/SparkyFitness
item.description: SparkyFitness: Built for Families. Powered by AI. Track food, fitness, water, and health — together.

item.title: Forceu/Gokapi
item.description: Lightweight selfhosted Firefox Send alternative without public upload. AWS S3 supported.

item.title: Volmarg/personal-management-system
item.description: Your web application for managing personal data. personal.management.system.inbox@gmail.com

item.title: r3-team/r3
item.description: REI3 - Free and open low code

item.title: EgalitarianMonkey/hometube
item.description: HomeTube is a friendly video downloader managing single video URL into organized content structure for automatic home media server experience.

item.title: cachethq/cachet
item.description: 🚦 Cachet, the open-source, self-hosted status page system.

item.title: fingerthief/minimal-chat
item.description: MinimalChat is a lightweight, open-source chat application that allows you to interact with various large language models.

item.title: cottand/leng
item.description: ⚡ fast dns server, built to block advertisements and malware servers
